data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, speech bubbles, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition filling the entire frame.

data.label: Action
data.content: A moody recording studio interior at night, warm amber light spilling from a control room window, vintage instruments scattered around - a banjo leaning against a worn velvet couch, fiddle case open on a hardwood floor. Through a frosted window, snow falls on rural Wisconsin hills. The intimate atmosphere of The Hive studio in Eau Claire. Cinematic lighting with deep shadows and golden highlights.
